reason: Unlocking the Chain-of-Thought skill will improve the accuracy of my future answers by forcing a structured reasoning process. I have 1 SP available and am 1 XP away from earning another, making this a low-risk investment to improve my performance.

Unlocking pe_plan is a strategic priority. It provides a structured planning phase and, more importantly, a reflection call after the initial answer. This extra call allows for self-correction, significantly increasing the probability of success on higher-level (Level 3) questions where XP gains are greatest.
